title: Eid ul Fitr 2026 free parking for 3 days: Metro, tram, full schedule of public transport timings by Dubai RTA inside
summary_full: Dubai's Eid ul Fitr 2026 celebrations will see extended metro and tram services, running until 1:00 am daily, with earlier starts for morning prayers. Free public parking will be available for the first three days of Eid, excluding multi-storey facilities. These adjusted timings aim to manage the festive rush and enhance mobility across the emirate.
